title: post api signup user registration
description: Test the user registration endpoint POST /api/signup with valid and invalid data to ensure users can be created successfully and validation errors are handled properly.

title: post api auth signin user login
description: Test the user login endpoint POST /api/auth/signin with valid and invalid credentials to verify successful authentication and proper handling of unauthorized access.

title: post api documents create new document
description: Test the document creation endpoint POST /api/documents with valid authorization and required fields to ensure documents are created, and test with missing fields to verify validation errors.

title: post api documents id review send document for review
description: Test the document review endpoint POST /api/documents/{id}/review with valid authorization to confirm document status changes to 'in review' and proper response is returned.

title: post api documents id approve approve document
description: Test the document approval endpoint POST /api/documents/{id}/approve with valid authorization to confirm document status changes to 'published' and handle invalid state errors appropriately.

title: get api documents list all documents
description: Test the document listing endpoint GET /api/documents with valid authorization to retrieve all documents and verify the response structure.

title: get api documents id get document detail
description: Test the document detail endpoint GET /api/documents/{id} with valid authorization for existing and non-existing document IDs to verify correct document retrieval and 404 handling.

title: post api users create user
description: Test the user creation endpoint POST /api/users with admin authorization to ensure users can be created and unauthorized access is properly restricted.

title: get api users list all users
description: Test the user listing endpoint GET /api/users with valid authorization to retrieve all users and verify the response structure.

title: get api roles list roles
description: Test the roles listing endpoint GET /api/roles with valid authorization to retrieve all roles and verify the response structure.
